titleStmt.title: SII 9.366: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 366. (A.R. No. 298 of 1926.) ON A BLACK STONE PLANTED IN THE COMPOUND OF THE TEMPLE OF CHENNAKESAVASVAMI AT MADHURAPURAM, A DEPOPULATED HAMLET OF DAMPETLA, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1147, Tāraṇa, Māgha, śu. 11, Maṅgaḷavāra corresponding to A.D. 1225 January 21 Tuesday, in the reign of the Yādava king Siṁhaḷadēva. It records that Jaya • • •, son of Dhannayya-Rāhuta, made a grant of land to the Mahājanas of Madhurāpura for the service of the god Alahaperumāludēva of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatusakavarusaṁ 1147 neya
tāraṇasaṁvatsara māgha su 11 maṁgaḷavāradaṁdu
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpithivīvallabha yā
davanārāyaṇa pratāpasiṁhaḷadēva rā
jyābhyudayaṁgaiyuttamire madaha
stigaṁdhavāraṇa gaṁḍagōpāḷa turakarē
vaṁta kadanapracaṁḍa gaṁḍamārttaṁḍa nu
ḍidaṁtegaṁḍa Atigarvvavanuḍiva maṁḍa
ḷikara garbasarvvasvacūṟakāṟa maṟe
vokkara kāva tanagidara Āṟeyaṟa ta
leya ceṁḍāḍuva kudureveṁḍaḷiva
koḍaṟuvara baṟasiḍalu dhannayya
rāhutana kumāra jaya ge ja
yābhyudayavāgalu śrīmadhu
rāpurada śrīyaḷahaperumā
ḷadēvara mahājanaṁgaḷige bhūmi
dāna biṭṭa datti sarvvanamassivāya
vāgi koṭṭa sāsana Ādityacaṁdra
dēvaruḷḷaṁnaka yidakke Āvanādo
ḍaṁ Aḷihidavanu gaṁgeya taḍi
yalu kavileya koṁda pāpada
lu hōhanu naratiya koṁda pāpa
talu hōhanu kattetuṁṇiya tānu
taṁna heṇḍatiyuṁ tāyitaṁde
yu tiṁdavaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā vō harēti vasu
ṁdharaṁ saṣṭirvvaruṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ḥ . śrīyaḷahape
rumāḷadēvara nityānaṁdādīvige nivē
dyakkaṁ mōdaguyyalalu huṁṭa 1 keyi
10 mahājanaṁgaḷu koṭaru kalukuṭi
gabamōjaṁge gade ko 5 keyi ko 5 .
Digital edition of SII 9.366 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
